title: デビュー戦の後に・黎明

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Nailed it!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that was some slick running from Satono
Diamond! No wonder she got such a high
evaluation score!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She was so calm and relaxed, you wouldn't think
this was her debut race! She's definitely got a
bright future ahead of her!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I hope she can win a G1 race and break the
Satono jinx!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I've finally made my debut!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It only started to sink in once I'd finished running.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The audience's cheering, the pressure from the
other racers and the sound of their breathing, the
taut sense of tension in the air...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'd never felt such an atmosphere before. So this is what a real race is like!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This is the kind of atmosphere both McQueen and
Kita have been running in...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And now, I'm finally standing on the same turf as
them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond's excitement is palpable,
evidence of just how deeply moving her debut
must have been.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to keep running and winning with these
two legs of mine, and make the Satono family's
wish into a reality!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We join the stream of people leaving the venue
after the races and head toward the station.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond ran so beautifully! You know,
the one who ran in the 500-Million-Point Battle?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That dash of hers in the final stretch was out of
this world for sure!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
I bet it won't be long before she's running in G1
races. I wouldn't be surprised if she aims for the
Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Come to think of it, have any of the
Umamusume from the Satono Group ever won a
G1 race?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Not yet. Plenty of Satono Umamusume have
raced before, but none of them ever managed to
secure a G1 victory.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That's why you'll sometimes see articles in
magazines with headlines like "The Satono Jinx:
The Family Cursed with No G1 Wins."

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Huh, I didn't know that was a thing. So it's like
they can't win a G1 race because of a jinx?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. There weren't any Satono Umamusume at
all for a while till Satono Diamond came along.
It'd be nice if she can nab a G1 victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While listening to the conversation between the
people walking in front of us, I glance over at
Satono Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! And I'm going to be the one to break the
jinx!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond grins cheerfully and strikes a
confident pose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her unwavering confidence and strength, I'm
sure she'll be able to dispel both the unpleasant
rumors and the jinx in one fell swoop.
